hero.description: 3D & 5D floor mats made from premium TPE material. Precision-cut for your vehicle. Water and dirt resistant.

home.whyDesc: Quality, precision fit and design – united in one floor mat.
home.feature1Desc: Eco-friendly, odourless and extremely durable. Flexible down to -40°C.
home.feature2Desc: Each mat is precision-cut via 3D scan for your exact vehicle model.
home.feature3Desc: Perfect fit without cutting. Simply place and you’re done.

widerruf.title: Right of Withdrawal
widerruf.chNoticeText: There is no statutory right of withdrawal for online purchases in Switzerland. However, we voluntarily grant you a 30-day return policy. See § 5 of our Terms & Conditions.
widerruf.euTitle: Right of withdrawal for EU customers
widerruf.euP1: If you are a resident of the European Union, you are entitled to the following statutory right of withdrawal:
widerruf.euP2: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason.
widerruf.euP3: The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the day on which you or a third party designated by you, who is not the carrier, has taken possession of the last goods.
widerruf.exerciseP1: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us by means of a clear statement (e.g. by email) of your decision to withdraw from this contract.
widerruf.exerciseP2: To comply with the withdrawal period, it is sufficient for you to send the notice of exercising your right of withdrawal before the withdrawal period has expired.
widerruf.consequencesP1: If you withdraw from this contract, we shall reimburse all payments received from you, including delivery costs (except for the additional costs resulting from your choice of a type of delivery other than the least expensive standard delivery offered by us), without undue delay and no later than fourteen days from the day on which we received notice of your withdrawal from this contract.
widerruf.consequencesP2: For this reimbursement, we will use the same means of payment that you used for the original transaction, unless expressly agreed otherwise with you.
widerruf.consequencesP3: We may withhold the reimbursement until we have received the goods back or until you have provided evidence that you have returned the goods, whichever is the earlier.
widerruf.consequencesP4: You must return the goods to us without undue delay and in any event no later than fourteen days from the day on which you notify us of your withdrawal from this contract. The deadline is met if you dispatch the goods before the fourteen-day period has expired.
widerruf.consequencesP5: You shall bear the direct cost of returning the goods.
widerruf.formIntro: (If you wish to withdraw from the contract, please complete this form and send it back.)
widerruf.formTo: To: Royal Road GmbH (FussMatt), Dübendorfstrasse 4, 8051 Zürich, info@fussmatt.com
widerruf.formText: I/We (*) hereby withdraw from the contract concluded by me/us (*) for the purchase of the following goods (*):

agb.title: General Terms and Conditions
agb.s1P1: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all orders placed via the online shop www.fussmatt.com. The shop is operated by Royal Road GmbH, Dübendorfstrasse 4, 8051 Zürich, Switzerland (hereinafter referred to as "FussMatt").
agb.s1P2: By placing an order, the customer accepts these Terms and Conditions. Deviating terms of the customer are not recognised unless FussMatt expressly agrees to their validity in writing.
agb.s2P1: The presentation of products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer, but rather a non-binding invitation for the customer to place an order.
agb.s2P2: By submitting the order, the customer makes a binding offer. The contract is concluded when FussMatt accepts the order by sending an order confirmation by email or by dispatching the goods.
agb.s3P1: All prices are quoted in Swiss francs (CHF) or euros (EUR), including the applicable value-added tax (8.1% in Switzerland / 19% in DE / 20% in AT).
agb.s3PaymentIntro: We accept the following payment methods:
agb.s3PaymentVisa: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via Stripe
agb.s3PaymentDue: Payment is due upon completion of the order.
agb.s4Intro: Delivery is made to the delivery address specified by the customer.
agb.s4Note: Delivery times are estimated and begin from the date of payment receipt. Delivery times may vary for dropshipping items.
agb.s5P1: For customers in the EU, the statutory right of withdrawal of 14 days from receipt of goods applies. Details can be found in our
agb.s5P2: For customers in Switzerland, we voluntarily offer a 30-day return policy from receipt of goods. The goods must be unused, in their original packaging and returned complete.
agb.s5P3: The customer bears the return shipping costs unless the goods are defective.
agb.s6P1: The statutory warranty rights apply. The warranty period is 2 years from delivery (pursuant to Art. 210 CO for Swiss customers / § 438 BGB for German customers).
agb.s7P1: FussMatt's liability for slight negligence is excluded to the extent permitted by law. This does not apply to damage to life, body or health.
agb.s8P1: The delivered goods remain the property of Royal Road GmbH until full payment has been received.
agb.s9P1: Information on the processing of your personal data can be found in our
agb.s10P1: Swiss law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG). The place of jurisdiction is Zürich, Switzerland.
agb.s10P2: For consumers in the EU, the mandatory provisions of consumer protection law of their respective country of residence also apply, insofar as they are more favourable.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.s1P1: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously and comply with the Swiss Data Protection Act (DSG) as well as the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), insofar as it is applicable to us.
datenschutz.s2Title: 2. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
datenschutz.s2P1: We collect personal data when you voluntarily provide it to us in the course of an order, contact request or registration. This includes:
datenschutz.s2List5: Payment information (processed directly by the payment provider)
datenschutz.s3P1: We use your data exclusively for:
datenschutz.s4P1: Our website uses cookies. These are small text files that are stored on your device.
datenschutz.s4EssentialP1: These cookies are required for the operation of the website (e.g. shopping cart, language settings). They cannot be deactivated.
datenschutz.s4AnalyticsP1: With your consent, we use analytics cookies to understand and improve the use of our website. You can decline these cookies via our cookie banner.
datenschutz.s5P1: This website uses Google Analytics (Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland). Google Analytics uses cookies to analyse website usage. The information generated by the cookie is transmitted to and stored on a Google server.
datenschutz.s5P2: IP Anonymisation: IP anonymisation is activated on this website. Your IP address is truncated before transmission.
datenschutz.s5P3: Legal basis: Your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR / Art. 31(1) DSG).
datenschutz.s6P1: We use the following third-party providers for payment processing:
datenschutz.s6Stripe: (Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd.) – credit card payments
datenschutz.s6Paypal: (PayPal (Europe) S.à r.l. et Cie, S.C.A.) – PayPal payments
datenschutz.s6P2: Your payment data is transmitted directly to the respective payment provider and processed in accordance with their privacy policies. We do not store any credit card numbers or bank details.
datenschutz.s7P1: We only share your personal data when this is necessary for the performance of a contract:
datenschutz.s7List3: Accountants / tax advisers for legally required bookkeeping
datenschutz.s8P1: We use appropriate technical and organisational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction or access by unauthorised persons. Our website uses SSL encryption.
datenschutz.s9P1: You have the right at any time to:
datenschutz.s9P2: Please send your requests to: info@fussmatt.com
datenschutz.s9P3: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC).
datenschutz.s10P1: We store your data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the respective purpose or as required by statutory retention obligations (usually 10 years under Swiss law).
datenschutz.s11P1: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy at any time. The current version is always available on our website.
